dashboard.subtitle: An overview of your business panel
dashboard.emptyTitle: You don't have a verified business yet
dashboard.emptyDescription: You can start managing your business by submitting a claim request.

listings.title: My Businesses
listings.emptyTitle: You don't have a verified business yet
listings.emptyDescription: You can start managing your business by submitting a claim request.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.freePlanNote: You are using the basic features.

claim.searchSubtitle: Search for and select the business you want to manage, then submit a claim request.
claim.vknHelp: The business tax identification number. Phone/domain verification is coming soon.
claim.introWhy: If you are the owner or an authorised representative of this business, you can submit a claim. Verified businesses can respond to reviews and update their profile information.
claim.introBullet1: Record a short video to verify your identity
claim.introBullet2: Prove business ownership with your Tax ID (VKN)
claim.introBullet3: Our moderators will review within 3 business days
claim.vknHint: Your VKN is the 10-digit number issued by the tax office.
claim.vknError: Invalid VKN. Please enter your 10-digit tax identification number.
claim.guestWall: Please log in to submit a business ownership claim.
claim.successMessage: Our moderators will review your application and get back to you within 3 business days.
claim.uploadError: There was a problem uploading the video. You can try again.
claim.errorGeneric: There was a problem submitting your application. Please try again.
claim.aydinlatmaLink: I have read the Business Verification Disclosure Text
claim.consent: I give my explicit consent under KVKK for my tax identification number and related personal data to be processed for the purpose of ownership verification.
claim.successDescription: Your ownership claim for {{name}} has been submitted for review. Once approved, your business panel will open and you will be notified by email.

video.cameraPermissionMessage: You need to allow camera access to record the verification video.
video.permissionDeniedMessage: Camera permission is required to record the verification video.
video.promptsTitle: Show the following in order during the video:
video.shot3: Behind the counter / cash register / kitchen / barber area
video.durationHint: Recommended duration: at least 30 seconds (max 60 s)

handoff.title: Complete the video on your phone
handoff.description: The ownership verification video must be recorded through the mobile app for security and location verification. Scan the QR code below with your phone or tap the link.

errors.invalidVkn: Enter a valid 10-digit tax identification number
errors.consentRequired: You must accept the KVKK disclosure to continue
errors.duplicate: You already have a pending request for this business
errors.generic: The request could not be submitted. Please try again
